title: Nether Star Recipe
description: Now craft your own nether stars
body:
🌟 Nether Star Recipe Datapack  
Craft the beacon’s heart—no Wither fight required!  
This datapack introduces a custom recipe for the Nether Star, letting players access this powerful item through rare materials and late-game progression.

✨ Features  
✅ Shapeless recipe using 4 Netherite Scrap + 4 Nether Quartz + 1 Block of Gold  
🧩 Lore-friendly integration with Nether and beacon progression  
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.16+
